name: Sentinelle
description: Self-hosted Bitcoin invoicing gateway: on-chain (xpub) and Lightning (phoenixd) invoices with a React admin.
compose:
name: "slashnode-sentinelle"
services:
  sentinelle:
    image: "ghcr.io/slashbinslashnoname/sentinelle:latest"
    container_name: "sentinelle"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HOST: "0.0.0.0"
      PORT: "8072"
      DATABASE_PATH: "/app/data/sentinelle.sqlite"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8072:8072"
    volumes:
      - "sentinelle-data:/app/data"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  sentinelle-data:
    name: "slashnode-sentinelle_sentinelle_sentinelle-data"
notes: First run: open /admin and set an admin password. In Settings, add a watch-only xpub (on-chain) and/or a phoenixd URL (Lightning), then create a merchant API key for your shop to call POST /api/invoices. Config and data live on the sentinelle-data volume.
